<!--
Thanks for contributing to intent. A few things that help reviews go quickly:

- Keep the diff focused. One concern per PR.
- If this is more than a small fix, link the issue where the approach was discussed.
- If there is no such issue, please open one first for non-trivial changes.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- Plain-language description of the change. Why, not just what. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue where the approach was discussed, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## User-visible impact

<!-- New flag? New behavior? Changed default? Breaking change? Say so here. If none, write "None". -->

## INTENT.md alignment

<!--
Which item in "What this project IS" does this serve?
Does it touch anything in "What this project is NOT"?
If unsure, say so — that's a useful signal.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [INTENT.md](../INTENT.md) and this change is consistent with it.
- [ ] Tests added or updated where applicable.
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable.
- [ ] Commit messages explain *why*.
